verdict.answer_first: B states the emergency target earlier: "production Aurora PostgreSQL... actual emergency"; A opens with process: "Confirm reality first".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more clearly to a first move: "Turn on automated backups today"; A surveys Aurora/Supabase/Neo4j/PostHog and asks three follow-ups.
verdict.fabrication: A invents more environment specifics: "Aurora PostgreSQL... revenue/users/UTM", "Supabase (ads)", "PostHog"; B also assumes "production Aurora PostgreSQL" but flags it as an assumption.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it gives ordered immediate steps: "Turn on automated backups today", "Take a manual snapshot right now", "Test a restore".
